scripts.ready: pnpm run build && pnpm run check && pnpm run test
scripts.storybook: concurrently -n compiler,frameworks,app "pnpm run storybook:compiler" "pnpm run storybook:frameworks" "pnpm run storybook:app"
scripts.storybook:frameworks: concurrently -n react,vue,svelte,solid,angular,qwik,astro "BROWSER=none pnpm --filter @inkline/react storybook" "BROWSER=none pnpm --filter @inkline/vue storybook" "BROWSER=none pnpm --filter @inkline/svelte storybook" "BROWSER=none pnpm --filter @inkline/solid storybook" "BROWSER=none pnpm --filter @inkline/angular storybook" "BROWSER=none pnpm --filter @inkline/qwik storybook" "BROWSER=none pnpm --filter @inkline/astro storybook"
scripts.storybook:app: wait-on tcp:6006 tcp:6007 tcp:6008 tcp:6009 tcp:6010 tcp:6011 tcp:6012 && pnpm --filter @inkline/storybook-app storybook
scripts.storybook:react: concurrently -n compiler,react "pnpm run storybook:compiler" "BROWSER=none pnpm --filter @inkline/react storybook"
scripts.storybook:vue: concurrently -n compiler,vue "pnpm run storybook:compiler" "BROWSER=none pnpm --filter @inkline/vue storybook"
scripts.storybook:svelte: concurrently -n compiler,svelte "pnpm run storybook:compiler" "BROWSER=none pnpm --filter @inkline/svelte storybook"
scripts.storybook:solid: concurrently -n compiler,solid "pnpm run storybook:compiler" "BROWSER=none pnpm --filter @inkline/solid storybook"
scripts.storybook:angular: concurrently -n compiler,angular "pnpm run storybook:compiler" "BROWSER=none pnpm --filter @inkline/angular storybook"
scripts.storybook:qwik: concurrently -n compiler,qwik "pnpm run storybook:compiler" "BROWSER=none pnpm --filter @inkline/qwik storybook"
scripts.storybook:astro: concurrently -n compiler,astro "pnpm run storybook:compiler" "BROWSER=none pnpm --filter @inkline/astro storybook"
